title: Anthropic Just Dropped a Masterclass on Building Agent Harnesses (for Large Codebases)
summary: Cole Medin builds out Anthropic's playbook for Claude Code in large codebases, demonstrating that the harness (context, config, tooling) matters more than the model itself. He constructs a complete "AI Layer" comprising a CLAUDE.md hierarchy, self-improving hooks, scoped skills, LSP, MCP, subagents, and a plugin that bundles the system, with a working example codebase provided.
